title: Sign Gravestone
description: Places signs on death with death message and time of death
body:
# Sign Gravestone

A lightweight Minecraft plugin that marks player deaths with a sign containing personalized death details.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfb291d1f28b71390254aa721d7b0c29b86e1f4e.png)
## Features
- 💀 Automatically places a sign at the location of death with how the player died  
- 🔁 Stacks multiple signs if players die repeatedly on the same block  
- ✍️ Supports fully customizable death messages per event  
- 🧱 Lets you define which blocks can be overridden if space is unavailable  

Easily configurable and perfect for servers that want to memorialize their fallen players with style.
